We've set everything up. All that's left is for you to walk in.

Meridian is built around the idea that good planning should feel effortless. Your workspace is blank right now, and that's the best part. It only shows what you put in.

GET STARTED FASTER

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Inter", "font_size": "11px", "font_weight": "700", "text_color": "#9A8E88", "line_height": "1.5", "letter_spacing": "0.15em", "background_color": "transparent", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 8, "padding_left": 0}}, {"type": "divider", "label": "Divider line", "props": {"border_color": "#DDD5CC", "thickness": 1, "style": "solid", "width": "100%", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0}}]}, {"type": "container", "label": "Image + Text", "props": {"layout": "row", "background_color": "#F5F0EB", "vertical_align": "center", "gap": 0, "padding_top": 20, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 40}, "children": [{"type": "container", "label": "Image column", "props": {"layout": "column", "background_color": "transparent", "vertical_align": "flex-start", "gap": 0, "width": "15%", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0}, "children": [{"type": "image", "label": "Image", "props": {"image_url": "/assets/letters/images/meridian/icon-video.svg?v=2", "alt": "", "image_width": "52px", "image_align": "left", "image_fit": "contain", "image_height": "52px", "background_color": "transparent", "border": "none", "border_radius": "8px", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0}}]}, {"type": "container", "label": "Text column", "props": {"layout": "column", "background_color": "transparent", "vertical_align": "flex-start", "gap": 4, "width": "85%", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0}, "children": [{"type": "text", "label": "Heading", "props": {"html_content": "

name: Festival Greetings
title: Festival Greetings
blocks_json:
[{"type": "text", "label": "Wordmark", "props": {"html_content": "

MARIGOLD & CO.

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Inter", "font_size": "11px", "font_weight": "700", "text_color": "#C8821E", "line_height": "1.7", "letter_spacing": "0.2em", "background_color": "#FFFDF5", "padding_top": 32, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 28, "padding_left": 40}}, {"type": "image", "label": "Featured image", "props": {"image_url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1635192592106-77a5aacbe1a3?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80", "alt": "Diyas glowing in the dark", "image_width": "100%", "image_align": "center", "image_fit": "cover", "image_height": "380px", "background_color": "#FFFDF5", "border": "none", "border_radius": "0", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0}}, {"type": "text", "label": "Heading", "props": {"html_content": "

Wishing you a warm Diwali.

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Georgia", "font_size": "26px", "font_weight": "700", "text_color": "#6B5040", "line_height": "1.2", "background_color": "#FFFDF5", "padding_top": 44, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 20, "padding_left": 40}}, {"type": "text", "label": "Note", "props": {"html_content": "

Every year around this time, the studio slows down a little. The days feel quieter. And it feels right to stop and write to the people who have made this work feel meaningful.

Thank you for being part of this year. We hope you get a proper, unhurried Diwali with the people you love.

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Georgia", "font_size": "16px", "font_weight": "400", "text_color": "#4A4540", "line_height": "1.9", "background_color": "#FFFDF5", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 8, "padding_left": 40}}, {"type": "text", "label": "Signature", "props": {"html_content": "

Ananya, founder of Marigold & Co.

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Georgia", "font_size": "14px", "font_weight": "400", "text_color": "#8A8480", "line_height": "1.7", "background_color": "#FFFDF5", "padding_top": 4, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 52, "padding_left": 40}}, {"type": "container", "label": "Footer", "props": {"layout": "column", "background_color": "#F5EFE3", "gap": 0, "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0, "align": "left"}, "children": [{"type": "container", "label": "Footer text section", "props": {"layout": "column", "background_color": "transparent", "gap": 0, "padding_top": 24, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 28, "padding_left": 40, "align": "left"}, "children": [{"type": "text", "label": "Footer text", "props": {"html_content": "

You're getting this because you've ordered from Marigold & Co. Unsubscribe anytime.

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Inter", "font_size": "12px", "font_weight": "400", "text_color": "#8A8480", "line_height": "1.5", "background_color": "transparent", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0}}]}]}]

[{"type": "text", "label": "Wordmark", "props": {"html_content": "

VOLTA

Volta will be offline for 2 hours on Jun 29. No action needed on your end.

2:00 AM – 4:00 AM UTC · Sunday, Jun 29

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Inter", "font_size": "18px", "font_weight": "700", "text_color": "#F6F5F3", "line_height": "1.3", "background_color": "transparent", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0}}]}, {"type": "container", "label": "Section Label", "props": {"layout": "column", "background_color": "#F6F5F3", "gap": 0, "padding_top": 36, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 16, "padding_left": 40}, "children": [{"type": "text", "label": "Label text", "props": {"html_content": "

WHAT'S AFFECTED

API & Webhooks

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Inter", "font_size": "13px", "font_weight": "700", "text_color": "#1A1917", "line_height": "1.4", "background_color": "transparent", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0}}, {"type": "text", "label": "Service detail", "props": {"html_content": "

Outbound calls and event delivery will be paused.

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Inter", "font_size": "12px", "font_weight": "400", "text_color": "#78716C", "line_height": "1.5", "background_color": "transparent", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0}}]}, {"type": "container", "label": "Column 2", "props": {"layout": "column", "background_color": "transparent", "gap": 6, "padding_top": 16, "padding_right": 8, "padding_bottom": 28, "padding_left": 8}, "children": [{"type": "text", "label": "Service name", "props": {"html_content": "

Read-only access stays active throughout.

name: Event Announcement
title: Event Announcement
blocks_json:
[{"type": "text", "label": "Wordmark", "props": {"html_content": "

ARC 2026

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Inter", "font_size": "11px", "font_weight": "700", "text_color": "#2555D4", "line_height": "1.7", "letter_spacing": "0.2em", "background_color": "#F7F6F3", "padding_top": 32, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 28, "padding_left": 40}}, {"type": "image", "label": "Featured image", "props": {"image_url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540575467063-178a50c2df87?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80", "alt": "Arc 2026 conference", "image_width": "100%", "image_align": "center", "image_fit": "cover", "image_height": "360px", "background_color": "#F7F6F3", "border": "none", "border_radius": "0", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0}}, {"type": "container", "label": "Hero", "props": {"layout": "column", "background_color": "#F7F6F3", "align": "left", "gap": 0, "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0}, "children": [{"type": "container", "label": "Heading area", "props": {"layout": "column", "background_color": "transparent", "align": "left", "gap": 0, "padding_top": 44, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 16, "padding_left": 40}, "children": [{"type": "text", "label": "Heading", "props": {"html_content": "

Three days.
